description: Describes one kill objective: which monster template to kill, how many, and drop conditions. An array of these is stored in the variable section after the fixed data.

fields.name: m_ulMonsterNum
fields.description: Number of this monster that must be killed.

fields.name: m_ulDropItemId
fields.description: Item template ID that must drop from the monster.

fields.name: m_bDropCmnItem
fields.description: Drop item is a common item (not a task item).
